isolation.scope: shared dev server/database; no code changes; guest auth-gate rerun only

assertionResults.title: Guest browse to login preserves purchase destination

steps.action: Open public home page and tap a product card as guest
steps.expected: Reach a public detail page before any auth gate

steps.action: Tap Purchase on the detail page
steps.expected: Redirect to login with callback preserving purchase intent
Return to the intended purchase destination after callback
steps.observed: Returned to /products/cmn74vjqb0006l04jqv2n3221?action=purchase, which auto-opened a purchase success modal; URL then normalized to /products/cmn74vjqb0006l04jqv2n3221 while the purchase modal remained open

assertionResults.title: Guest browse to login preserves create-listing destination

steps.action: Continue from the authenticated callback return on the same product detail page
steps.expected: Be at the intended listing entry flow or destination
steps.observed: User landed back on the product detail page after callback, not on a dedicated listing destination

steps.action: Tap For sale after the callback return
steps.expected: Resume the intended create-listing entry flow
steps.observed: A listing success modal opened inline on the detail page and the URL stayed /products/cmn74vjqb0006l04jqv2n3221

evidence.network: After login callback returned to /products/cmn74vjqb0006l04jqv2n3221?action=purchase and normalized to /products/cmn74vjqb0006l04jqv2n3221, triggering For sale stayed on the same detail URL and showed only an inline success modal

assertionResults.issues: The rerun confirms the prior issue for sell intent: authentication returned the user to the detail page, but did not resume a distinct create-listing entry flow after callback.

frictions.description: The guidance file /Users/wendy/.factory/library/user-testing.md referenced by mission instructions was not present.
frictions.resolution: Used AGENTS.md plus validation-contract.md and the parent task instructions as the operative guidance.

summary: Re-tested 2 assertions. VAL-CROSS-006 passed because purchase intent was preserved through login and auto-resumed via the callback query, while VAL-CROSS-008 still failed because sell intent did not resume a distinct listing-entry flow after authentication and only surfaced an inline success modal on the detail page.
